channel.title: Oracle — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Oracle (oracle).

item.title: CVE-2026-46843 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Vulnerability in Oracle REST Data Services (component: Core). Supported versions that are affected are 24.2.0-26.1.0. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTPS to compromise Oracle REST Data Servic…

item.title: CVE-2026-35233 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: An unprivileged attacker can craft a user-space process with a malicious ELF binary containing an out-of-range sh_link field. When root-level dtrace attaches to -- or instruments -- that process (via dtrace -p , pid probes, or USDT), the ELF parser r…

item.title: CVE-2026-21996 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: An unprivileged attacker can reliably trigger a crash of the dtrace process with a malicious ELF binary due to an integer Divide-by-Zero in Pbuild_file_symtab()
